new_jobs.title: IT Intern
new_jobs.description:
About HPL
Honest Public Ltd (HPL) is a group of companies, specializing in providing exceptional management services throughout Afghanistan. With over 1500+ staff throughout the country, we specialize in Supply, Logistics, Security, Customer Care, Consultancy, and Construction services.
At HPL, our top priority is delivering reliable and efficient services that meet the unique needs of our clients.
Our dedicated team of professionals works closely with clients to provide customized solutions that ensure maximum satisfaction.
We take pride in our ability to provide timely and dependable services to our clients, and we are committed to upholding the highest standards of quality and professionalism. Our services are designed to help businesses and organizations in Afghanistan operate effectively, safely, and efficiently.

Job Description
Assist in the installation, configuration, and maintenance of hardware and software.
Provide first-level technical support to users (in-person, via email, or over the phone).
Help maintain inventory of IT assets (hardware and software).
Support troubleshooting of network, internet, and connectivity issues.
Assist with system upgrades, backups, and data recovery processes.
Monitor and report any unusual system activity or security threats.
Document technical procedures and create user guides as needed.
Perform any other tasks as assigned by the IT Department.

Job Requirements
Education: Bachelor's degree in in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field. ​
Experience: Minimum 1 year of relevant experience.
Languages: Proficiency in both national languages and in English language.
Knowledge of computer hardware, software, and networking.
Familiarity with Microsoft Windows, Office applications, and IT tools.
Good problem-solving skills and willingness to learn.
Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
Ability to work independently and within a team.

Submission Guideline
To apply for the position, please follow these steps:
Open the link: HPL JOB APPLICATION FORM
Important Notes:
Please ensure that your current address and the specific job location you are applying for are clearly included in both your CV and application form .
Applications missing this information will not be accepted .
Applications received after the closing date will not be considered.
Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted.
If you encounter any issues during the application process, please contact us at (www.hpl.af/contacts)
Please Note that:
HPL commits to a fair and transparent recruitment procedure.
HPL will conduct its recruitment based on need only.
Only the HR department will contact you during the recruitment process.
Only short-listed candidates whose application responds to the criteria will be contacted & local applicants from the same province are encouraged to apply and will be given priority.
HPL is not responsible for any job announcements made on other websites or social media platforms. Only information shared through official channels will be considered valid.
HPL does not charge any fees at any stage of the recruitment process. Applying for a vacancy is completely free of charge.

Submission Email
visit this website (www.hpl.af/jobs) or click the link above "HPL JOB APPLICATION FORM"

details.Contract Duration: one Year (with possible extension based on performance)

new_jobs.title: QA & IT Officer
new_jobs.description:
About Nation Security Services
Nation Security Services (NSS) is one of the few National security companies in Afghanistan with the ability to run any type of security contracts. This is due to its long established links to Afghan and International professionals with extensive experience in hostile security environments, administration and project management. Our experience enables us to provide well-trained, professional security personnel capable of performing in all fields of the security industry. We also have the added advantage of having security and medical advice teams consisting of international consultants and operational management mentors, who have a vast experience in security management worldwide. Our services are tailored to the requirements and demands of our clients

Job Description
Quality Assurance:
Key Accountabilities:
Ensure client satisfaction through 24/7 communication, address complaints/ problems and ensure contractual requirements & standards
Ensure implementation of PSC1/ISO 18788/9001:2015 standards across all projects
Maintain data base of all company documents samples
Ensure all staff are trained in accordance with and are aware of PSC1/ ISO standards, policies and procedures…
Conduct daily, quarterly, biannual and annual internal audits to monitor implementation of PSC1/ISO
Conduct on-going training of management or staff to update staff on PSC1 / ISO requirements and updates
Assist in creating PSC1/ ISO systems and procedures
Daily/ Weekly/ Monthly liaison with consulting PSC1/ ISO auditor (in English)
Present company policies & procedures in relation to PSC1/ ISO to an international audit panel(in person)
Any other duties and responsibilities as assigned by line manager
IT:
Key Accountabilities:
IT Officer is responsible for the full management of the information technology and computer systems network of NSS Company
IT officer is responsible to plan, organize, control and evaluate IT data operations
IT Officer is responsible to design, develop, implement and coordinate systems, policies and procedures
Ensure security of data, network access and backup systems are adhered to
Act in alignment with user needs and system functionality to contribute to organizational policy
Identify problematic areas and implement strategic solutions in time
Audit systems and assess their outcomes
Preserve assets, information security and control structures
The file server should be managed and controlled under the supervision and management of IT Officer
Backups of the data of the company in the server system or in the secured hard disk system weekly or monthly
To change, edit or disable the email user account as per company policy in case on employee is terminated, moved to other position or leaves the job
To maintain NSS company website more secure by providing the SSL digital certificates
To assist in rebranding the websites professionally to grab the client attention
Quality of internet should be supervised under the management of IT Officer
Develop and maintain IT policy
Monitor firewall and Cyber security of all projects and company HQ’s
Develop overall standard for hardware and conduct training to employees on all new software’s and hardware.
Any other tasks assigned by line manager

Job Requirements
Educational Qualification:
Bachelor’s degree in Quality Management, Computer Science, Information Technology, or a closely related field.
Formal training or certification in Quality Management Systems or auditing practices is highly desirable.
Relevant IT certifications in system administration, networking, or IT service management are an advantage.
Postgraduate qualification in a relevant discipline is considered an asset.
Professional Experience:
Minimum five (5) years of relevant professional experience in Quality Assurance and Information Technology functions.
Proven exposure to organizational compliance processes, document control, and participation in internal or external audits.
Practical experience to troubleshoot IT-related issues, users, and basic system testing.
Technical Knowledge:
Sound understanding of Quality Management Systems, compliance monitoring, and audit preparation.
Familiarity with documentation control, corrective action follow-up, and process improvement practices.
Ability to troubleshoot IT-related issues and maintain reliable system support.
Skills & Personal Competencies:
Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.
Effective written and verbal communication skills.
Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Office applications (Word, Excel, and PowerPoint).
Advanced command of spoken and written English.
High level of integrity and responsibility.
Ability to work independently and maintain professional coordination with departments.
Commitment to professionalism and continuous learning.

Submission Guideline
Submission Guideline:
Submission Email
Interested and qualified candidates should send their cover letter with updated CV (cv + docs in 1x PDF) to NSS HR department – hrmngr@nss.af.
NSS HR department should receive applications by close of business 22 May 2026 (before 4:00 PM). Applicants should clearly indicate the vacancy number and job title in the email subject line otherwise, their applications will not be considered.
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the interview
IMPORTANT NOTES
Applications will be reviewed thoroughly and only those candidates will be contacted for interviews whose qualifications meet the requirement of the job.
Short listed candidates are normally contacted within a week after the deadline for applications.
Applicants should have at least three references of the company management where previously worked.
All documents/Certificates should be attached to the CV(cv + docs in 1x PDF)

Submission Email
hrmngr@nss.af

details.Experience: Minimum five (5) years of relevant professional experience in Quality Assurance and Information Technology functions.
details.Education: Bachelor’s degree in Quality Management, Computer Science, Information Technology, or a closely related field.
details.Years of Experience: Minimum five (5) years of relevant professional experience in Quality Assurance and Information Technology functions.

new_jobs.title: Digital Content Creator
new_jobs.salary: As per company salary scale policy
new_jobs.description:
About Katawazai Developments
Katawazai is one of Afghanistan’s leading real estate development companies, dedicated to redefining modern living and commercial spaces. With landmark projects across Kabul, we combine innovative architecture, premium quality, and strategic locations to deliver exceptional value to our clients. Our vision is to shape the skyline of Afghanistan by developing the tallest and most iconic skyscrapers, offering luxury, comfort, and lasting investment opportunities.

Job Description
We are looking for a creative and talented Multimedia Content Creator to join our media team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for producing engaging visual content through video editing , graphic design , and occasional camera shooting for digital and social media platforms. The candidate should have a strong creative mindset, attention to detail, and the ability to create high-quality multimedia content aligned with our brand and communication goals.
Key Responsibilities
* Create and edit professional video content for social media and digital platforms
* Design creative visual and still graphics for marketing and branding materials
* Capture photos and videos using professional cameras when required
* Develop engaging multimedia content ideas and concepts
* Ensure content quality, creativity, and consistency with brand identity
* Collaborate with the media and marketing team on campaigns and content planning
* Stay updated with social media trends and modern content styles

Job Requirements
* Strong professional experience in video editing using Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects
* Graphic design skills using Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator
* Videography skills and proficiency in operating different types of cameras
* Experience in multimedia content creation for digital and social media platforms
* Creativity and strong visual storytelling ability
* Understanding of social media platforms and digital content trends
* Ability to work independently and meet deadlines
* Strong communication and teamwork skills
* Bachelor’s degree in Journalism, Computer Science, Marketing, or related field preferred.

Submission Guideline
Interested candidates are invited to send their CVs to realestate@katawazai.com
Please make sure to mention the Vacancy Number and Job Title in the subject line of your email.
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview.

Submission Email
realestate@katawazai.com

details.Salary: As per company salary scale policy

new_jobs.title: استاد در رشته های کمپیوتر ساینس،اقتصاد، شرعیات، ریاضیات و فزیک (Re Announced)
new_jobs.description:
About Jahan University
پوهنتون جهان یکی ازپوهنتون های معتبر در افغانستان است که در سرک سه کارته نو شهر کابل فعالیت می‌کند. این پوهنتون با هدف ارائه آموزش عالی معیاری در رشته‌های مختلف علمی و مسلکی ایجاد شده و در بخش‌های چون کمپیوترساینس، اقتصاد، حقوق، طب معالجوی، و شرعیات به سطح لیسانس و ماستری فعالیت می‌نماید. پوهنتون جهان همچنان در بخش تحقیق، آموزش عملی و همکاری‌های علمی تلاش دارد تا زمینه رشد علمی محصلان را فراهم سازد
جهان گروپ: شامل پوهنتون جهان، جهان کابل، 5 انستیتیوت طبی و 17 باب لیسه عالی در شهر کابل میباشد. که حدودا 20000 شاگرد و محصل در این نهاد های آموزشی، آموزش میبیند.

Job Description
۱-رهنمایی اعضای کادر علمی و محصلان طبق مقرره تحصیلات عالی؛
۲-ارزیابی آثار و کنفرانس های علمی اعضای کادر علمی و سایر دانشمندان و ابراز نظر در رابطه به آنها؛
۳-اشتراک فعال در محافل علمی منحیث گرداننده، سخنران و یا اشتراک کننده؛
۴-اشتراک فعال در کمیته ها، مجالس و شورا های علمی؛
۵-سهمگیری مسولانه در بهبود امور پوهنحی و موسسه تحصیلات عالی مربوطه به منظور انکشاف پیشرفت علمی و حفظ منافع و مصلحت های موسسه؛
۶-ارتقای سویه ی دانش به ویژه در رشته ی اختصاصی و کسب مهارت های مانند: آموزش یک زبان معتبر بین المللی و کمپیوتر؛
۷-تهییه لکچر نوت ها و رهنمود کار های علمی – ساحوی و لابراتواری؛
۸-رهبری و اشتراک در تالیف کتابهای درسی، ممد درسی و مرجع؛
۱۰- عضو فعال در تحقیقات علمی؛
۱۱-اشتراک در امتحانات ورودی محصلان جدیدشمول؛
۱۲-سایر فعالیت ها و وظایف که در قانون تحصیلات عالی و مؤسسه تحصیلات عالی جهان پیش بینی شده است؛

Job Requirements
حد اقل دارنده تحصیلات عالی به سویه ماستر در رشته های اقتصاد،کمپیوتر ساینس، شرعیات،
حد اقل سه سال تجربه کاری در بخش تدریس در سطح پوهنتون را دارا باشد .
توانایی و مهارت برنامه های آفیس کمپیوتر راداشته باشد
تسلط کامل به زبان های ملی (دری و پشتو) و انگلیسی بلدیت داشته باشد.
توانایی رهبری و پیشبرد تحقیقات علمی را داشته باشد.

Submission Guideline
از عمومی متقاضیان گرامی که واجد شرایط هستند، خلص سوانح خویش همرای اسکن اسناد تحصیلی،تذکره تابعیت و اسکن قرارداد خط/سند تجربه کاری را با نوشتن نام پوهنحی مربوطه و ذکر ووکنسی نمبر به ایمیل آدرس های ذیل ارسال بدارند یا هارد آنرا تسلیم آمریت منابع بشری این نهاد تسلیم نمااید.
jobs.jahanuni@gmail.com
job@jahan.edu.af

Submission Email
job@jahan.edu.af, jobs.jahanuni@gmail.com

expiring_soon.title: IT Contractual Employee
expiring_soon.description:
Role Summary
Troubleshoot network in real time while maintaining high system availability and able to contribute ideas, share knowledge and help others to develop, in addition field engineer need to perform core network device initial installations, configurations under supervision and approval of line manager.
Monitor and maintain smooth operation and minor configurations in field network devices

Duties and Responsibilities
· Develop quarterly, Semi-annual and Annual Plan in compliance with the organizational plan.
· Oversight and technical assistant to head office and branch staff related to IT issues.
· Ensure proper maintenance of computers peripherals, printer, networking, internet & e-mail, security, data backup and recovery.
· Assist to install software, network, internet, email, printer and update antivirus for all head office and branches.
· Follow up, maintenance support IT system at regional Office and Branches.
· Train and guide user on using new software, PC maintenance and troubleshoot.
· Installs and configures computer hardware, software, systems, networks, printers, and scanners
· Provides technical leadership on a variety of highly specialized project-related activities requiring expertise in specific technical areas for core information technology systems and services.
· Maintains currency of knowledge with respect to relevant state-of-the-art technology, equipment, and/or systems.
· Performs miscellaneous job-related duties as assigned
· Participates as a member of the IT management team in planning, problem resolution, and reviewing department performance.
· Perform any other task assigned by the Line manager.
· Monitor and maintain IT Network Services that include E1 Connections smooth operation, and make sure network latency, network devices performance utilization report, field office and ISP customers regularly checked and report on time.
· Troubleshoot WAN/LAN networks in real time while maintaining high system availability.
· Make sure all security aspects, setting and configurations (like Firewall Rules, Mac Filtering, DoS settings, IPS settings, SSL settings, Encryption, Authentications, IP to user Mapping and etc.) are maintained under approved procedures.
· troubleshoot intranet, Internet, E1, P2P, resolve ISP customer daily issues.
· Maintain and mange Wireless Controllers, Access points, Firewalls, VPNs and Monitoring tools.
· Ensure daily activities are compliant with IT Policies and Procedures.
· Supervise junior IT staff and ensure quality services and support delivery.
· Review logs of network devices record and report suspicious activities.

Job Requirements
Education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technologies or related field.
Experience: Minimum of 1 year of experience working in same positions as Telecom Fraud Management Engineer, IT engineer, or IT Officer,
Skills Required:
· Strong understanding of a process driven environment
· Strong experience configuring and troubleshooting Cisco, ZTE, Huawei Routers and switches.
· Knowledge, Skills, and Abilities Required and Strong written and verbal and interpersonal skills
· Strong customer service experience required relevant professional certifications or training desirable.

Submission Guidelines
متقاضیان میتوانند cv یا خلص صوانح شانرا به ایمیل آدرس های hr@afghantelecom.af با ذکر نمبر بست (IT Contractual -005) و عنوان بست درموضوع ایمیل ارسال نمایند. متقاضیانیکه درخواستی خویش را بعد از تاریخ اعلان بست ارسال مینمایند و یا هم شرایط مندرج این بست را تکمیل ننمایند شامل پروسه امتحان تحریری و مصاحبه نمیگردند.

expiring_soon.title: IT Manager
expiring_soon.category: IT Billing, IT - Hardware, IT - Software, IT Support
expiring_soon.description: Role Summary AurumPay is seeking an experienced and hands-on IT Manager to lead and manage our core technical infrastructure. As a licensed Electronic Money Institution (EMI), this role is critical in ensuring 99.99% uptime , security, and regulatory compliance of our digital wallet platform. The ideal candidate will have deep expertise in Oracle Solaris environments and Sophos security infrastructure , and will act as a bridge between development, security, and operations teams to ensure systems are secure, scalable, and audit-ready. Duties and Responsibilities Key Responsibilities 1. Server Infrastructure (Oracle Solaris & Enterprise Systems) Lead the installation, configuration, and hardening of Oracle Solaris servers Configure and manage Automated Installer (AI) for network-based provisioning Administer Oracle Solaris Zones (containers) to isolate application environments Monitor system performance, including kernel tuning and resource management (ZFS, DTrace) Implement backup strategies, including ZFS snapshots and disaster recovery procedures 2. Network Security (Sophos Firewall & Perimeter Defense) Deploy, configure, and maintain Sophos Firewall (XG/XGS series) Implement firewall policies, VLAN segmentation, and access control lists (ACLs) Manage secure connectivity through Site-to-Site (IPsec/SSL) and SSL VPN Monitor and optimize threat protection tools, including MDR, IPS, Web Filtering, and Application Control 3. EMI & Fintech Compliance · Ensure all configurations align with Central Bank (DAB) regulations for EMI operations. · Maintain logs for all access to financial systems; prepare for internal and external audits. · Lead IT audit and change management processes – no unapproved changes to firewall, Solaris zones, or payment integrations. · Manage Business Continuity (BCP) and Disaster Recovery (DR) drills with measurable targets: RTO < 1 hour, RPO < 15 minutes for transaction systems. 4. IT Operations & Management Manage Windows/Linux servers where the application stack interfaces with Solaris. Oversee vendor management for internet links and hardware procurement. Lead and support the internal IT helpdesk team 5. Budget & Vendor Management (Critical addition) · Prepare and manage the annual IT budget, including hardware, software licenses (Oracle, Sophos), and support contracts. · Negotiate with vendors for internet links, data center services, and hardware procurement. Job Requirements Required Technical Skills & Competencies Expert-level experience with Oracle Solaris, including installation, Zones, ZFS, and networking Proficiency in Linux (RedHat/CentOS) and Windows Server environments Strong expertise in Sophos Firewall (XG/XGS), including policy configuration, NAT, VPN, and high availability Solid understanding of networking concepts such as VLANs, TCP/IP, and routing protocols (BGP/OSPF) Familiarity with fintech systems and standards such as ISO 8583, 3D Secure, PCI DSS, and high-availability architectures Experience with virtualization technologies such as Solaris Zones, VMware vSphere, or similar platforms Experience & Qualifications Minimum 5+ years of experience in IT infrastructure management At least 3 years of hands-on experience with Oracle Solaris and Sophos security solutions Prior experience in fintech, banking, or EMI environments is required Preferred Certifications: Oracle Certified Professional (OCP) – Solaris Sophos Certified Architect or Engineer CCNA, ITIL v4 Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field Personal Attributes High level of integrity and ability to handle sensitive financial systems Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work under pressure Detail-oriented with a strong focus on documentation and audit readiness Submission Guidelines How to Apply: Interested and qualified candidates are invited to submit their CV and cover letter (in PDF format) to jobs@aurumaf.com Please mention the position title “IT Manager” in the subject line of your email. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview.

details.Functional Area: IT Billing, IT - Hardware, IT - Software, IT Support

expiring_soon.title: NOC Contractual Engineer
expiring_soon.description:
Role Summary
The NOC Engineer is responsible for monitoring, maintaining, and troubleshooting the network infrastructure to ensure maximum availability and performance. This role supports real-time network operations, incident management, and proactive fault detection across core, access, and IP backbone (IPBB) networks.

Duties and Responsibilities
· Monitor network performance and availability using NMS tools (e.g., SolarWinds, PRTG, U2020, EMS, PRS)
· Identify, troubleshoot, and resolve network incidents
· Escalate complex issues to higher-level engineering teams when required
· Perform root cause analysis (RCA) and prepare incident reports
· Ensure SLA compliance and minimize network downtime
· Monitor alarms, events, and KPIs across IP, transmission, and core networks
· Support network changes, maintenance activities, and upgrades
· Maintain accurate network documentation and logs
· Coordinate with field teams, vendors, and internal departments
· Ensure proper ticket handling
Technical Skills Required
Strong understanding of:
TCP/IP, routing protocols
Switching technologies (VLAN)
IP Backbone (IPBB) networks
GSM/LTE/UMTS RAN/Core network basics
Experience with network monitoring tools (e.g., SolarWinds, PRTG, U2020, EMS, PRS)
Knowledge of Network Key Performance Indicators (KPI)
Soft Skills
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Ability to work under pressure in a 24/7 shift environment
Good communication and reporting skills
· Team collaboration and coordination ability

Job Requirements
Education: At least a Bachelor’s degree in ( BCS or ICTI ) or a related field.
Certifications (preferred but not mandatory):
CCNA / CCNP (Cisco)
Network+
ITIL Foundation
Work Experience:
1–3 years of experience in network operations or telecom environment
Fresh graduates with strong networking knowledge may also be considered
Other Skills:
· Full proficiency in one of the national languages (Pashto/Dari) and familiarity with the English language.
· Strong computer skills and proficiency in relevant software applications.
· 24/7 shift-based operations (including nights, weekends, holidays)
· Fast-paced NOC environment with real-time monitoring

Submission Guidelines
متقاضیان میتوانند cv یا خلص صوانح شانرا به ایمیل آدرس های hr@afghantelecom.af با ذکر نمبر بست (NOC-004) و عنوان بست درموضوع ایمیل ارسال نمایند. متقاضیانیکه درخواستی خویش را بعد از تاریخ اعلان بست ارسال مینمایند و یا هم شرایط مندرج این بست را تکمیل ننمایند شامل پروسه امتحان تحریری و مصاحبه نمیگردند.

· داشتن اسناد کوتاه مدت تحصیلی(سرتیفکیت ) MCSE .

Submission Guidelines
متقاضیان میتوانند cv یا خلص صوانح شانرا به ایمیل آدرس های hr@afghantelecom.af با ذکر نمبر بست (NSS-001) و عنوان بست درموضوع ایمیل ارسال نمایند. متقاضیانیکه درخواستی خویش را بعد از تاریخ اعلان بست ارسال مینمایند و یا هم شرایط مندرج این بست را تکمیل ننمایند شامل پروسه امتحان تحریری و مصاحبه نمیگردند.

expiring_soon.title: Database Developer National Consultant
expiring_soon.description:
About CTG
CTG was established in 2006, almost 20 years ago, in Afghanistan. We currently operate in 35 countries and have approximately 11,500 staff members committed to good!
But do you know who we are? And what do we do?
We provide tailored Human Resources and Staffing Solutions that support critical global initiatives across Humanitarian and Development sectors, and are now strategically foraying into new industries, including Construction, Energy, and IT, with a focus on high-risk regions.
Here’s a list of services we offer:
•Staffing solutions and HR management services
•Monitoring and evaluation
•Fleet management and logistics
•Facilities management
•Sustainability and Communications Advisory
•Election monitoring and observation
•IT professional services
•Medical assistance
Visit www.ctg.org to find out more.

Job Description
Background : The Afghanistan Food and Drug Authority (AFDA), as the national regulatory authority, is responsible for ensuring the quality, safety, and efficacy of medicines, medical devices, healthcare products, and food. Despite important progress, Afghanistan’s regulatory system continues to face challenges, including limited technical capacity, high dependence on imported products, inconsistent adherence to quality standards, and evolving systems for product registration, inspections, licensing, and market surveillance. Strengthening AFDA’s regulatory functions in alignment with WHO norms and standards is essential to protect public health, prevent substandard and falsified products, and support the country’s broader goals for health system resilience and universal health coverage.
To advance these priorities, AFDA is implementing regulatory reforms guided by the WHO Global Benchmarking Tool (GBT), which provides a structured framework for assessing regulatory maturity and developing Institutional Development Plans (IDPs). To accelerate progress, specialized technical support is required to strengthen GBT implementation, enhance capacity in GMP, regulatory workflows, medicines registration, regulatory information systems, and AMR-related oversight. The engagement of an international consultant will provide targeted expertise, hands-on mentoring, and capacity-building to AFDA staff, supporting the development of sustainable, evidence-based, and internationally aligned regulatory systems that effectively safeguard public health in Afghanistan.

Job Requirements
1. Purpose of the Consultancy:
The purpose of this post is to design, develop, and maintain high-quality databases to meet AFDA requirements. The incumbent ensures seamless integration between backend and frontend systems, delivers secure and maintainable code, and contributes to the overall efficiency and scalability of AFDA’s digital services.
2. Output:
The outputs of this post include scalable and secure web applications that provide reliable backend services and responsive frontend interfaces. The role ensures enhanced user experience, efficient database integration, and high application performance. By maintaining best practices and documentation, it supports future scalability, sustainable software maintenance, and the successful delivery of digital services.
3. Tasks:
· Design, develop, and maintain scalable web applications using Django (backend) and React + TypeScript (frontend).
· Build and optimize RESTful APIs and integrate with PostgreSQL databases.
· Implement clean, maintainable, and secure code following best practices.
· Collaborate with designers, product managers, and other developers to deliver high-quality features.
· Troubleshoot, debug, and optimize application performance and write and maintain technical documentation
Deliverables:
Deliverable 1: Fully functional databases and Clean, maintainable, and secure code adhering to best practices.
Deliverable 2: Technical documentation covering system architecture, workflows, and APIs.
Deliverable 3: Optimized application performance, troubleshooting, and debugging reports.
Qualifications and experience:
Education :
Essential: Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, Software Engineering, or a related field. A Master’s degree is preferred and may be considered an asset.
Experience :
Essential: A minimum of 2 years of progressively responsible experience in database development, design, and Django, react.nexjs at a specialist level.
Skills / Technical skills and knowledge:
• Excellent interpersonal and communication skills.
• High sense of responsibility and strong organizational skills with ability to work under pressure.
• Advanced computer literacy (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, etc.)
Languages :
• Excellent knowledge of English
• Good Local Languages (Pashto and Dari)
Additional Information
WHO has zero tolerance for sexual misconduct, inaction against it and any form of retaliation against victims/survivors or bystanders who disclose, report, or participate in an investigation. Parallel to technical competence, recruitment, selection and hiring decisions will give due emphasis to assessing candidates value congruence, thorough background checks and reference check processes. This will ensure children and vulnerable adults are safeguarded from abusers and that abusers are prevented from joining WHO Afghanistan office. Please report any concerning information regarding sexual exploitation and abuse by WHO workforce and partners to WHO office of Internal Oversight services at investigations@who.int
WHO is a smoke free environment.

Tick the boxes and click submit.
You will see your application under the Application tab

tech_banking_jobs.title: IT & Western Union Assistant for Sar-e-Pol
tech_banking_jobs.description:
About Bank-e-Millie Afghan (BMA)
Bank-e-Millie Afghan (BMA) is the foremost first financial institution of Afghanistan established in 1933. Similarly, it was the first financial institution established in a public-private partnership set up with a 72% share held by the private sector. As the first bank in the country, BMA introduced formal banking services to the people and government of Afghanistan. Since then, the bank’s competitive strength and ongoing market leadership philosophy lays in its strong capital base and proven trustworthiness. In 1976, it was fully nationalized by the government of Afghanistan. Since its establishment, BMA has been a leading bank in providing modern and secure banking services. Securing depositors' funds is the top priority of the bank. At the same time, the bank is contributing considerably to the development of manufacturing, agriculture, services, and international trade in the country. BMA is operating based on strong corporate governance principles, financial risk management, and strict compliance to keep its credibility and trust. At present, BMA has 17 City Branches including the HQ and 4 Counters in Kabul, 22 Provincial Branches and 3 Counters accompanied by a broader outlook and prospect for growth and expansion in near future, and equity investments in the USA and England.

Job Description
The Branch IT + Western Union (WU) Assistant is responsible for providing technical support and assistance with IT systems in the branch, ensuring the efficient operation of banking technology. Additionally, this role encompasses managing Western Union transactions and services, providing exceptional customer service, and ensuring compliance with relevant policies and procedures.
Key Duties and Responsibilities:
IT Support
Technical Assistance
Provide day-to-day technical support for all banking software and hardware used within the branch.
Troubleshoot and resolve hardware and software issues, ensuring minimal disruption to branch operations.
Branch IT related Items Maintenance
Assist in the maintenance and updating of branch IT systems, including computers, networks, and hardware’s.
Ensure that all IT equipment is functioning properly and coordinate with external vendors for repairs as needed.
Provide services to branch all IT items at least twice in a month
User Training
Train branch staff on the use of banking software, equipment, and IT best practices to enhance their operational efficiency.
Develop user guides and training materials for specific IT processes as required.
Data Security
Assist in monitoring and implementing security measures to protect branch IT systems and customer data.
Ensure compliance with data protection policies and procedures.
Reporting
Maintain accurate records of service requests and IT incidents, providing reports to the Branch Manager and IT Department as needed.
WU (Western Union) Operations
Transaction Processing
Manage and process Western Union transactions including Send and receive, ensuring that all transactions comply with WU policy and procedure.
Assist customers with inquiries related to Western Union services, providing accurate information and resolving any issues that arise.
Customer Service
Provide exceptional customer service to clients utilizing Western Union services, ensuring a positive customer experience.
Compliance and Reconciliations
Process all WU transactions as per AML/CFT policy.
Conduct daily basis reconciliation during end of the day.
Prepare and submit reports related to Western Union activities to the Branch Manager.
Compliance
Adhere to all regulatory and compliance requirements related to customer service and banking operations.
Assist with CSO of the branch in daily branch activities.
Punctuality. (Follow official working time schedule properly).
Behave in a professional way with all the colleagues and customers of the branch.
Any other task assigned by Line Manager or will be assigned other duties and responsibilities as may be required to meet the goals and objectives of the bank.

Job Requirements
Education: Bachelor’s degree in BCS and master’s degree is preferred.
Experience: 3 years of experience and previous experience in IT support within a banking or financial services environment is a plus.
Skills and Competencies:
Strong technical skills with proficiency in computer systems, networking, and common software applications.
Excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to troubleshoot technical issues effectively.
Good communication and interpersonal skills, with a strong focus on customer service.
Ability to work collaboratively within a team and manage multiple tasks effectively.
Attention to detail and strong organizational skills.
Fluency in Dari, Pashto, and English is required.

Submission Guideline
Qualified and interested applicants are encouraged to apply online through the BMA Job Portal at https://jobs.bma.com.af before the closing date.
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further process.

Submission Email
https://jobs.bma.com.af
